journals.name: PLOS ONE
journals.description: A peer-reviewed open access scientific journal published by the Public Library of Science. It covers primary research from any discipline within science and medicine.

journals.name: Scientific Reports
journals.description: An online open access scientific mega journal published by Nature Research, covering all areas of natural and clinical sciences.

journals.name: BMJ Open
journals.description: An open access medical journal from the BMJ Group, publishing medical research from all disciplines and therapeutic areas.

journals.name: PeerJ
journals.description: An open access mega journal covering the biological, medical, and environmental sciences with an emphasis on sound methodology.

journals.name: Nature
journals.description: The flagship multidisciplinary journal publishing high-impact original research across the natural sciences.

journals.name: Science
journals.description: The AAAS flagship journal covering cutting-edge research and policy across all scientific disciplines.

journals.name: PNAS
journals.description: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences — broad multidisciplinary coverage of biological, physical, and social sciences.

journals.name: Nature Communications
journals.description: An open access journal that publishes high-quality research in biology, health, physics, chemistry, and Earth sciences.

journals.name: Cell
journals.description: The flagship Cell Press journal for mechanistic and molecular life-science research.

journals.name: eLife
journals.description: A peer-reviewed open access scientific journal for the biomedical and life sciences, backed by leading research institutions.

journals.name: Cell Reports
journals.description: An open access journal from Cell Press, publishing high-quality research across the entire life sciences spectrum.

journals.name: The EMBO Journal
journals.description: A leading journal for molecular and cellular biology published by the European Molecular Biology Organization.

journals.name: The Lancet
journals.description: A leading general medical weekly featuring clinical trials, reviews, and global health content.

journals.name: New England Journal of Medicine
journals.description: Premier journal for clinical research, therapeutics, and medical practice updates.

journals.name: BMJ
journals.description: British Medical Journal — clinical research, evidence synthesis, and health policy.

journals.name: JAMA
journals.description: Journal of the American Medical Association — broad clinical research and medical commentary.

journals.name: Nature Methods
journals.description: Leading journal for novel methods and techniques in the life sciences.

journals.name: Bioinformatics
journals.description: The core journal for computational biology, algorithms, and biological data analysis.

journals.name: BMC Bioinformatics
journals.description: An open access journal covering computational methods for biological and biomedical data.

journals.name: GigaScience
journals.description: An open access journal for large-scale biological and biomedical data science.
